title: Multiple Myeloma Open-Question Record Template v0
question_text: Which source-backed fields are required before a public multiple myeloma evidence graph can link target, therapy, trial-landscape, and open-question records without implying clinical actionability?

question_context.public_summary: Template-only public research question for schema cross-link readiness before evidence graph or map-builder tooling.

uncertainty.summary: A valid open-question record can organize a public research question and its links, but it cannot establish evidence strength, clinical importance, urgency, patient relevance, actionability, or the next clinical step for any person.
known_unknowns: Whether an open question deserves expert review depends on separate source-backed review, not schema validity.
Whether a linked target, therapy, trial-landscape record, claim, or gap supports stronger language requires separate source checking.

review_notes: Template validates Open-Question Record Schema v0 without creating a clinical priority list, evidence-strength ranking, patient-specific question, treatment recommendation, trial recommendation, or actionability claim.
No patient-specific fields, real case data, urgency labels, evidence ranking fields, clinical priority fields, candidate options, trial matching, or expanded-access guidance are present.
